_comment: Schema fields with no INSERT/UPDATE write path. Each entry MUST have reason + resolves_when. When the resolving milestone lands, remove from this allowlist.

knowledge.delete_reason.reason: Soft-delete metadata; Sub 1 maintenance lane (ADR-0004) will write it

completion_evidence.user_overrode_low_ev.reason: Phase 1b user-override flow not implemented; decision pending
completion_evidence.user_overrode_low_ev.resolves_when: Phase 1b override-completion UI path landed OR field dropped

question.rubric_json.reason: Sub 1 JudgeTask grading config; not yet written by ingestion
question.rubric_json.resolves_when: Sub 1 JudgeTask + question authoring path implemented

question.judge_kind_override.reason: Sub 1 per-question judge override; not yet written

question.source_ref.reason: Provenance ref unused; ADR-0006 v2 后 event.payload.source 替代
question.source_ref.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 落地，决定 keep or drop

question.root_question_id.reason: Variant family tree backbone; Sub 0d Step 14 VariantGenTask

question.created_by.reason: Provenance for AI-generated questions; ADR-0006 v2 will fill via event(action='generate', subject_kind='question')

learning_item.source_ref.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 落地，决定 keep or drop

learning_item.primary_artifact_id.reason: ADR-0004 Phase 2 — learning_item ↔ artifact 双向关联

learning_item.child_learning_item_ids.reason: Denormalised counterpart to parent_learning_item_id; children are derived via SELECT WHERE parent_learning_item_id=X. Keep the column for forward-compat (Phase 2 may activate it for ordering) but no write path planned.
learning_item.child_learning_item_ids.resolves_when: Phase 2 — if/when ordered child arrays become a UX need; otherwise drop

learning_item.ai_score.reason: AI-assessed value score; not yet implemented
learning_item.ai_score.resolves_when: Sub 0d AI proposal scoring path implemented

learning_item.due_at.reason: Sub 0d MaintenanceProposeTask sets due_at on learning_item; not yet written

learning_item.reviewed_at.reason: Sub 0d learning lane review timestamp; not yet written

study_log.content_md.reason: study_log free-form content; not yet written by UI

study_log.artifact_id.reason: study_log ↔ artifact link; ADR-0006 v2 likely converts study_log → event(action='generate', subject_kind='note')
study_log.artifact_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 ADR-0006 v2 study_log → event migration

answer.input_kind.reason: Answer table currently unused; Phase 1c.2 /review submit will write

artifact.id.reason: artifact table zero usage; ADR-0006 v2 revives via GenerateArtifact event

artifact.tool_kind.reason: Same as artifact.id (tool_kind for tool-based artifacts e.g. quiz)

echo_jobs.error_md.reason: Sub 0c golden E2E hard-fail path not implemented; echo handler only writes success path. error_md reserved for explicit failure scenarios test
echo_jobs.error_md.resolves_when: Sub 0c echo hard-fail E2E test added OR field dropped

_comment_phase1c1_lane_a: Phase 1c.1 Lane A added 4 new tables (event, learning_session, material_fsrs_state, knowledge_edge). Their write paths land in Lane B (Zod schemas in src/core/schema/event/**) and main-lane Step 4-6 (server read-path rewrite + /api/events + edges CRUD). Lane A only declares schema; write paths must follow.

learning_session.summary_md.reason: type='conversation' session summary; Lane B / Step 5 LearningSession module writes

learning_session.goal_id.reason: Phase 1d goal linkage placeholder; not written in 1c.1

learning_session.started_at.reason: Session writer in Lane B / Step 5; defaults via DB but no app-level write yet

learning_session.ended_at.reason: Session end transition in Lane B / Step 5

event.session_id.reason: event-stream writer lands in Lane B / Step 4 (server read-path rewrite + events queries module)
event.session_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.actor_kind.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.actor_ref.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.action.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.subject_kind.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.subject_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 events writer module implemented

event.caused_by_event_id.reason: event chain — judge ← attempt link; Lane B / Step 4 attribution writer
event.caused_by_event_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4 attribution event writer implemented

event.cost_micro_usd.reason: AI event cost stamping in Lane B / Step 7 AI prompt/registry updates
event.cost_micro_usd.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 7 AI prompts emit cost on event write

material_fsrs_state.subject_kind.reason: FSRS projection writer in Step 4-5 review handler
material_fsrs_state.subject_kind.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4-5 review event → FSRS state projection implemented

material_fsrs_state.subject_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4-5 review event → FSRS state projection implemented

material_fsrs_state.due_at.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4-5 review event → FSRS state projection implemented

material_fsrs_state.last_review_event_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 4-5 review event → FSRS state projection implemented

knowledge_edge.from_knowledge_id.reason: knowledge_edge CRUD in Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges and Step 7 AI propose-edge branch
knowledge_edge.from_knowledge_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges + Step 7 AI propose implemented

knowledge_edge.to_knowledge_id.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges + Step 7 AI propose implemented

knowledge_edge.relation_type.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges + Step 7 AI propose implemented

knowledge_edge.weight.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges + Step 7 AI propose implemented

knowledge_edge.created_by.resolves_when: Phase 1c.1 Step 6 /api/knowledge/edges + Step 7 AI propose implemented
